channel.title: CPTS Preparation Track on 0ximhuzaifa
channel.description: Recent content in CPTS Preparation Track on 0ximhuzaifa

item.title: Ghost Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: LDAP injection to AD forest compromise via Gitea RCE, Kerberos abuse, Golden SAML, linked MSSQL, and ExtraSIDs Golden Ticket attack.

item.title: Snoopy Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Chain LFI, DDNS abuse, Mattermost takeover, Git symlink exploitation, and ClamAV XXE to gain root on this Hard Linux machine.

item.title: Redelegate Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Chain anonymous FTP, KeePass credential recovery, MSSQL abuse, password reuse, and constrained delegation to achieve Domain Admin.

item.title: Craft Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Source code review leads to Python eval() RCE in a Docker container, followed by credential discovery and HashiCorp Vault SSH OTP for root.

item.title: Authority Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Compromise an Active Directory domain by chaining an exposed SMB share, cracked Ansible Vault secrets, a PWM LDAP credential leak, and an AD CS ESC1 misconfiguration.

item.title: Administrator Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Full Active Directory compromise through ACL abuse, Password Safe credential recovery, targeted Kerberoasting, and DCSync.

item.title: Voleur Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Kerberos-only AD compromise featuring Kerberoasting, deleted object recovery, DPAPI decryption, SSH pivoting, and NTDS extraction.

item.title: StreamIO Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Exploitation chain involving SQL injection, source code disclosure, remote code execution, internal MSSQL enumeration, BloodHound analysis, and LAPS abuse.

item.title: Vulncicada Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Abuse Kerberos relay with marshal/unmarshal SPN to exploit AD CS ESC8, obtain a Domain Controller certificate, perform DCSync, and compromise Active Directory.

item.title: Media Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Explore a Windows machine featuring NTLM hash capture, junction point abuse, and SeTcbPrivilege exploitation to obtain full system compromise.

item.title: TombWatcher Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Explore WriteSPN abuse, gMSA password extraction, Deleted Objects recovery, and ESC15 AD CS privilege escalation on HTB TombWatcher.

item.title: Pov Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Exploit LFI to leak ViewState keys, achieve .NET deserialization RCE, recover credentials, and abuse SeDebugPrivilege to obtain SYSTEM.

item.title: Postman Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Explore Redis key injection, SSH access abuse, and Webmin CVE-2019-12840 privilege escalation on HTB Postman.

item.title: Trick Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Explore DNS zone transfers, SQL injection, LFI, SMTP mail poisoning, and Fail2Ban privilege escalation on HTB Trick.

item.title: Jeeves Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: Explore web enumeration, Jenkins remote code execution, JuicyPotato privilege escalation, and NTFS ADS abuse on HTB Jeeves.

item.title: Fluffy Machine Writeup | HTB
item.description: A walkthrough of Fluffy, featuring CVE-2025–24071, Shadow Credentials, and certificate-based privilege escalation.
